items.title: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to all adult users

items.title: Mixtape is a musical portrait of teenage life
items.description: Playing Mixtape is like playing a video game version of a high school movie. Kids banter about the meaning of life and the theme songs that would play when they walk in a room.
